retry_reason: Put operations decrement the reference count; if the object is already freed, calling it again would be a use-after-free. There is no transient failure condition.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper for struct btrfs_delayed_node. It decrements the reference count by one via __btrfs_release_delayed_node. When the count reaches zero, the callee will free the node. After calling this function, the caller must not access the node pointer. The tracker parameter is passed through for debugging/tracking purposes. The operation is unconditional and always succeeds in releasing the reference; there is no return value to check.
